chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No. 805 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) For hearing of bail application. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 10.07.2025 Mr. Abdul Basit, advocate for the applicant. Ms. Seema Zaidi, Addl. P.G. Sindh. Mr. Muhammad Daud Narejo, advocate for complainant alongwith complainant. ------------------ Counsel for the applicant files a statement that certain amount now has been paid to the complainant and as per contents of FIR, the complainant was allegedly deprived of from such amount. On the other hand, counsel for the complainant, present in the court, confirms and extends his no objection regarding confirmation of ad-interim bail already granted to the applicant. Similarly, Addl. P.G. Sindh also concedes to this position by extending her no objection. Since the amount of disputed cheque has been paid by the applicant, which shows his bonafide therefore, the benefit of doubt regarding means rea and actus rea in the case can be extended at bail stage. Accordingly, the ad-interim bail granted earlier is hereby confirmed on the same terms and conditions as recorded in the said order dated 24.03.2025. Instant criminal bail application stands disposed of. J U D G E SAJID
